super_admin.label: Platform Admin
super_admin.description: Manages the full SentinelLaw platform across firms.

org_admin.label: Firm Admin
org_admin.description: Full administrative control within one firm.

compliance_admin.label: Compliance Admin
compliance_admin.description: Manages governance rules, alerts, and compliance controls.

operator.label: Integration User
operator.description: Manages integrations, API keys, and operational testing.

reviewer.label: Staff
reviewer.description: Views dashboards and day-to-day firm activity.

auditor.label: Compliance Reviewer
auditor.description: Reviews logs, reports, and audit evidence.
